+    private int _nextId = 9;

+    public IReadOnlyList<string> GetCategories()
+    {
+        return _recipes.Select(r => r.Category).Distinct().OrderBy(c => c).ToList();
+    }
+
+    public IReadOnlyList<Recipe> GetByCategory(string category)
+    {
+        return _recipes.Where(r => r.Category.Equals(category, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)).ToList();
+    }
+
+    public Recipe? GetById(int id)
+    {
+        return _recipes.FirstOrDefault(r => r.Id == id);
+    }
+
+    public void AddRecipe(Recipe recipe)
+    {
+        recipe.Id = _nextId++;
+        _recipes.Add(recipe);
+    }
+
+    public void AddRating(int recipeId, int stars)
+    {
+        var recipe = GetById(recipeId);
+        if (recipe is null || stars is < 1 or > 5) return;
+
+        var totalStars = recipe.AverageRating * recipe.RatingCount + stars;
+        recipe.RatingCount++;
+        recipe.AverageRating = Math.Round(totalStars / recipe.RatingCount, 1);
+    }
+}

data.content:
The project builds successfully. Here's what was created:

**Project**: `RecipeCommunity` — Blazor Web App with Server interactivity

**Structure**:
- `Models/Recipe.cs` — Recipe data model
- `Services/RecipeService.cs` — In-memory recipe store with 8 seed recipes across 4 categories
- **Pages** (all SSR by default, interactive only where needed):
  - `Home.razor` — Homepage with category cards (static)
  - `Browse.razor` — `/browse/{Category}` — Lists recipes with ratings (static)
  - `RecipeDetail.razor` — `/recipe/{Id}` — Full recipe with interactive `StarRating` component
  - `SubmitRecipe.razor` — `/submit` — Interactive form with validation (`@rendermode InteractiveServer`)
- `Components/StarRating.razor` — Hover + click star-rating widget (`@rendermode InteractiveServer`)
- Updated `NavMenu` with category links and Submit Recipe
- `RecipeService` registered as singleton in `Program.cs`
